classification.summary: This act requires that any legal action affecting title, possession, use, or liens on real estate must be filed with the county clerk's office, along with a memorandum detailing the action, the person whose rights are affected, and a description of the real estate. This filing serves as notice to subsequent purchasers, lessees, or incumbrancers. Without such a filing, the action will not affect the rights of a bona fide purchaser, lessee, or incumbrancer who has no notice of the action. New notices are required if the description of the real estate or the claim against it is amended. If the real estate is in multiple counties, separate notices must be filed in each county.
